title: Why Drawing Tablet Brands Won't Collaborate on Linux Floss Drivers
summary: This article discusses the lack of collaboration from drawing tablet brands (like Wacom, Huion, XP-Pen) on developing open-source (FLOSS) drivers for Linux. It analyzes business incentives, proprietary hardware lock-in, and the technical challenges of reverse-engineering, explaining why companies prioritize Windows/macOS support over community-driven Linux drivers.
